privileged_info_summary: The task is a Spanish vocabulary flashcard creation exercise with verified specifications: it requires creating a 4-page flipchart saved to /home/ga/Documents/Flipcharts/la_casa_vocabulario.flipchart with a 'La Casa' (The House) theme. Page 1 contains title text 'La Casa' and 'Vocabulario' with a decorative shape. Pages 2-4 contain Spanish vocabulary with English translations: 'La cocina/Kitchen', 'El dormitorio/Bedroom', and 'El baño/Bathroom', each with a colored rectangle placeholder. All Spanish vocabulary terms are legitimate, real Spanish words used in standard educational contexts. The minimum requirement is 4 shapes total and all 8 specified text terms distributed across the 4 pages.
